blended.narrative: Granite Peak is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. The 14-day outlook shows 12 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 54°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Friday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 6" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
